translations.source: qore-l : Natakamani : qo : mlo : apedmk : mk-se : selele : tenke : to : pesto-b-ke
translations.translation: By the grace of apedmk, King Natakamani apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

translations.source: amni : mk : qore-l : Amanishakheto : kdke : qo : mlo : pesto-b : tenke : to : akine : to : selele

translations.source: qore-l-o : Amanishakheto : amni-te : kdke : qo : mlo : apedmk : mk-se : beke : selele : to
translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King Amanishakheto amni apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

translations.source: qore-l : Shanakdakhete : kdke : qo : mlo : amni : mk-se : selele : tenke : to : pesto-b-ke

translations.source: apedmk : mk : qo-se : selele-wi : abr : mlo : beke
translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk by apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.
